title: Chocolate-Covered Banana Pops Hunger Bar
description: This resource pack replaces the default hunger bar with chocolate-covered banana pops, adding a fun and delicious twist to your Minecraft experience in a vanilla friendly way.
body:
# Normal:
![Half depleted Minecraft hunger bar if it was chocolate-covered banana pops](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/29dba99993457ca1d79bede6dddf58a7e3c2978a.png)

# Affected by Hunger:
![Half depleted Minecraft hunger bar affected by the hunger effect if it was chocolate-covered banana pops](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/db4f0d3f92092eebf81a2f0173a15fdc9487d5ec.png)

## Full Appleskin Compatibility:
![Chocolate-Covered Banana Pops Hunger Bar using Appleskin](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/04db3a9356a12b4dec626740808838a76f2058f5.png)

![Highliting the pumpkin pie item in the inventory uing Appleskin](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b44d631e16c2eae5f6123e66890c32edcfd3ba71.png)![Highliting the rotten flesh item in the inventory uing Appleskin](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bb13d552a737035fe76c19a0f075a33856d6dae1.png)
###  About:
This resource pack replaces the default Minecraft hunger bar with a fun and quirky design. Instead of the standard meat-on-bone icons, you'll enjoy chocolate-covered banana pops inspired by the Banana Guards from Adventure Time!
